activities_projects.title: Law of Reflection Verification
activities_projects.objective: Experimentally verify the law of reflection
steps: Fix a plane mirror vertically on a sheet of paper
Direct a ray of light from a torch towards the mirror
Mark the incident and reflected rays using pins
Measure the angles with a protractor
Compare the angles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands and verifies the law of reflection

activities_projects.title: Focal Length Measurement of Concave Mirror
activities_projects.objective: Determine the focal length of a concave mirror
steps: Place a candle in front of a concave mirror
Move a screen to obtain a sharp image
Measure the distance between mirror and image
Record the focal length
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns how to measure focal length experimentally

activities_projects.title: Convex Mirror Field of View Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate why convex mirrors are used as rear-view mirrors
steps: Place several objects in front of both mirrors
Observe the number of objects visible
Compare the field of view
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands practical uses of convex mirrors

activities_projects.title: Image Formation with Convex Lens
activities_projects.objective: Study real image formation by a convex lens
steps: Place the candle in front of the lens
Move the screen behind the lens until a clear image appears
Measure object and image distance
Record the results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands real image formation with lenses

activities_projects.title: Lens Magnification Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand magnification produced by a convex lens
steps: Place printed text under a convex lens
Change the distance between lens and text
Observe how image size changes

activities_projects.title: Multiple Reflection Experiment
steps: Place two mirrors at different angles
Shine a torch beam between them
Observe the number of reflections formed

activities_projects.title: Build a Working Periscope
activities_projects.objective: Apply mirror reflection to build a simple optical device
steps: Fix mirrors inside the box at 45° angles
Create viewing holes
Use the periscope to observe objects above eye level

activities_projects.title: Image Distance Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study how image distance changes with object distance
steps: Place a candle at different distances from the lens
Adjust the screen to form the image
Record image distances
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relation between object and image distance

activities_projects.title: Mirror Image Orientation Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate orientation of images formed by different mirrors
steps: Place an object in front of each mirror
Observe image size and orientation
Record results

activities_projects.title: Optical Device Research Project
activities_projects.objective: Explore real-life applications of mirrors and lenses
steps: Choose devices such as camera, microscope, or telescope
Identify mirrors or lenses used
Explain how they form images
